description: You are logged into the wger fitness manager at http://localhost as the admin user (username: admin, password: adminadmin). A client using the 'Push-Pull-Legs' routine has shoulder pain. Modify the 'Push Day' within the 'Push-Pull-Legs' routine by replacing the 'Overhead Press' exercise with 'Lateral Raise' configured for exactly 3 sets of 15 repetitions. Do not delete the entire training day or alter the existing 'Bench Press' and 'Triceps Extension' exercises.
